description: Casual dressing only gets better with these slip-on sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality - they're a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Upper Single piece leather upper covering the forefoot and mid-foot for maximum durability, breathable comfort and style Cushioned textile lining for added comfort Stitch detailing for added strength Brand tag on the strap Cushioned, leather foot-bed for maximum sweat-free protection and all-day comfort with printed branding Upper stitched to outsole for maximum durability Outsole Curved TPU outsole in ergonomic design with multi directional lugs for maximum grip on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
